title: Severi Salminen
text: Home * People * Severi Salminen Severi Salminen [1] Severi Salminen , a Finnish professional violinist, master of music from Sibelius Academy , Helsinki , computer scientist with B.Sc. and M.Sc. degrees from Aalto University in 2016 and 2019 respectively [2] , and software developer and former computer chess programmer. He is author of ssRay, an unbiased Monte Carlo path tracing renderer capable of producing very realistic looking images [3] , and author of the WinBoard compliant chess engine Requiem [4] .
